findings.problem: The chapter's claimed behavioral turn (Anika choosing sustainable restraint) is only partly earned on-page: the decisive pressure stretch is summarized, then the stop is triggered by a slip and reinforced by adult controls. The consequence chain reads as externally enforced more than self-authored.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand the hinge spans at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:233 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:395 plus snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:409 so the restraint decision is dramatized before the slip, then revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:446 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:496 so supervision consequences follow her explicit choice/reporting rather than replacing it. Strategy options: voluntary self-stop before warning breach, or immediate self-disclosure before Jonah asks.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text gives one explicit on-page line near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:395 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:409 where Anika chooses to stop or report before external intervention, and the extra-hour clinic beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:233 contains at least one concrete temptation-and-refusal moment instead of summary. FAIL if agency remains inferential or adult-imposed.

findings.problem: Sanitization drift at high-pressure beats: the second clinic block is compressed to summary at the exact moment identity change should be rendered, and the anger spike is euphemized as "swore under her breath" instead of specific language/action. This softens consequence and tension.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:233, replace summary with a short lived scene showing one concrete rep cycle where she resists overloading in real time. At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:426 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:427, replace euphemism with exact spoken words and immediate bodily aftermath. Keep diction class-aware and embodied.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:233 is revised into at least one on-page action exchange (not a summary sentence) and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:426 plus snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:427 contain explicit uttered frustration rather than a euphemism. FAIL if either beat still reads as protective narration.

findings.problem: Timidity in consequence handling: after the compulsive overrun snaps, the scene moves quickly into procedural control (timer confiscation, supervision text) before fully inhabiting Anika's fear/shame response. The prose retreats from the emotional reality the premise sets up.
findings.rewrite_direction: Between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:407 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:446, add a brief interior-consequence beat (body sensation plus self-assessment) before authority logistics take over, then sharpen the self-report at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:492 with one concrete emotional cost marker.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text includes at least one explicit interior fear-or-shame beat after the slip and before Jonah's rule reset, and the text message at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:492 carries a concrete emotional or physical consequence beyond schedule facts. FAIL if aftermath remains mostly procedural.

findings.problem: Elliptical clipping recurs in narration ("Not severe. Just enough." / "Not depot this time. App-driving." / "Not pain. Not fatigue."). This repeats more than twice and conflicts with the constitution's ban on clipped narration, turning emphasis into a prose tic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite those spans into grammatically complete clauses while preserving tempo at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:183, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:184, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:253, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:254, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:389, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:390. Use sentence-length variation without subject-dropping fragments.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each cited span is revised to complete clauses with explicit subjects/verbs and no bare "Not X." fragment construction. FAIL if clipped fragment emphasis remains in those locations.

findings.problem: Recurring constructions flatten texture: repeated "old + noun" labeling (old spark/script/answer/Ravi/plan/hunger/bargaining/freedom) and repeated "She pictured..." openings stack as formula rather than discovery.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the cited lines so at least half of these repeats are replaced with scene-specific perception or action. Prioritize snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:199, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:305, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:377, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:215, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:217. Keep one recurrence where intentional, diversify the rest.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised cited spans reduce "old + noun" labels to no more than two total and the temptation cluster at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:215 plus snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:217 uses at least two different sentence openings. FAIL if the same formulaic labels/openers still dominate those beats.

findings.problem: Anika's counting/logistics stress tell is over-literalized through repeated timestamping and minute marks, which starts to feel mechanically imported from the style-bible profile rather than organically varying prose rhythm.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep only hinge timestamps (e.g., warning/end points) and convert several other time mentions at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:15, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:341, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:484, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:490 into sensory or behavioral progression cues.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least three non-hinge timestamp beats in the cited spans are replaced by embodied progression markers while chronology remains clear on first read. FAIL if the revised chapter still relies on frequent clock stamps to carry emotional escalation.

summary: Dialogue register is mostly consistent with the style bible (high contraction use, distinct Jonah/Ravi/Anika cadence), and no canonical continuity contradiction or sustained tense drift was found. The chapter still fails booker/craft/prose due a partially offstage transformation hinge, sanitization at pressure points, clipped-fragment prose that violates constitutional constraints, and repeated formula patterns that flatten texture.
